description_long: This is a stylized adult human figure with a simplified, mannequin-like appearance. The figure is dressed in a short-sleeved top and calf-length pants, both of which are form-fitting and feature a wide horizontal band around the waist. The head is smooth and featureless, lacking facial details, and the hair is represented as a single, sculpted mass. The arms are straight and relaxed at the sides, and the feet are covered with low-profile shoes. The overall proportions and posture suggest a neutral, upright stance suitable for urban pedestrian environments.
description: A stylized adult mannequin in fitted short-sleeve top and calf-length pants, standing upright with relaxed arms and simple shoes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full outfit, featureless face, and relaxed arm position.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, torso, and the straight leg posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the horizontal waist band, and the back of the shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and arm alignment.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeve fitted top and calf-length pants
